metadata.siteDescription: An open, borderless community empowering Arabs to lead the future of blockchain technology.

hero.title: Arabs in Blockchain
hero.subtitle: Built by Arabs, open to all — empowering the Arab world to thrive in blockchain domain.

learn.title: Learn Together
learn.description: Study groups, hands-on workshops, and live Q&As — tailored for everyone from the crypto-curious to seasoned builders.

meet.title: Meet & Network
meet.description: Grassroots, community-run meetups across Arab nations and side-events at major global blockchain conferences.

represent.title: Arabs in Web3
represent.description: We make sure Arab builders show up strong at Devcon, ETHcc, Devconnect, and beyond — making our voices heard.

opportunities.title: The Community Has Your Back
opportunities.intro: Since 2020, this community has been opening doors and getting members into rooms they wouldn't have found alone.
opportunities.cultureNote: It all happens because people here actually pay attention and pass opportunities down the line. That's our culture, and we keep it moving.

strip.item3: 📚 25+ fully funded scholarships to Consensys Academy Bootcamp
strip.item4: 🌍 Direct tracks to global Web3 builder ecosystems
strip.note: Real impact. This is who we are.

tickets.title: Free Tickets
tickets.description: We've sent active members straight to Devcon and Devconnect. Whenever conference tickets come our way, the community gets first dibs.

scholarships.title: Learning Tracks
scholarships.description: We keep an eye on the ecosystem to bring the best educational resources to Arab learners, starting with our legendary 25+ free Consensys slots.

grants.title: Grants & Funding
grants.description: Members actively share grant leads and jump in to help review applications to give you the best shot at securing funding.

jobs.title: Job Openings
jobs.description: We pass along hot Web3 job openings, share insider leads, and make internal recommendations whenever possible.

join.title: Your People Are Here
join.subtitle: 1,000+ builders across 15+ countries. Come learn, network, and find your place in the future of Web3.

contributors.title: The People Behind It All
contributors.subtitle: Speakers, builders, organizers, donors, and volunteers — every role, every contribution, every act of showing up makes this community what it is.

upcoming.title: Upcoming Events
upcoming.subtitle: Where the Arab blockchain ecosystem comes alive.

host.title: Want to co-host an event with us?

about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: The mission, the milestones, and the faces behind the movement.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: Arabs in Blockchain is a borderless community dedicated to accelerating Arab representation in Web3. Since 2020, we’ve been fostering native education, collaboration, and real opportunities for Arabic speakers globally — helping builders evolve from tech enthusiasts into ecosystem leaders.

speakers.title: Arabic Speakers
speakers.description: Anyone who speaks Arabic or is passionate about native content.

origin.title: Arab Heritage
origin.description: People of Arab descent thriving anywhere across the globe.

living.title: Based in the Arab World
living.description: Anyone currently living, working, or building within the region.

timeline.title: Our Journey
timeline.2020: Started as a spark on Facebook, LinkedIn & Discord — launched our very first tech webinar series.
timeline.2021: Hosted the inaugural Arab Blockchain Week — secured 25+ Consensys scholarships — launched our Telegram hub, kicking off true community building.
timeline.2022: Broke ground with our first IRL events at AUC Cairo — hosted Web3 Wellness Day — took over the stage at GITEX Dubai — co-organized Pitch Run Arabia.
timeline.2024: Brought the web3 side-event concept to Egypt with our Cairo mixer. Expanded globally with our first flagship international side-event at ETHcc 7 Brussels. Secured fully funded Devcon Bangkok tickets for 20+ community members, prioritizing brilliant women and student builders.
timeline.2026: Hosting the official high-energy IRL hacking hub for the Dev3pack Hack — bringing local builders under one roof in Cairo for an intense, caffeine-fueled building experience.

community.title: Join the Movement
community.subtitle: Be a part of shaping the Arab blockchain frontier.

join.title: We hang out on Telegram
join.subtitle: Free to join. Open to all. Come say hi and introduce yourself!

opportunities.title: We Open Doors
opportunities.subtitle: Exclusive resources curated directly for our community members.

tickets.title: Free Conference Passes
tickets.description: We secure and distribute free passes to premier Web3 conferences worldwide, including Devcon, ETHcc, and more.

scholarships.title: Premium Ecosystem Training
scholarships.description: Get direct access to top-tier, structured Web3 bootcamps, courses, and educational grants.

grants.title: Project Funding & Grants
grants.description: Get early leads on ecosystem grants and get community feedback to polish your project pitch.

jobs.title: Curated Job Opportunities
jobs.description: Handpicked Web3 job openings directly from our trusted global partner network.

people.title: People Who Make It Happen
people.subtitle: Every local meetup, technical talk, and line of open-source code is powered entirely by this community.

volunteers.subtitle: The legends who show up, roll up their sleeves, and bring every single event to life.

form.name: Your Name

form.privacy: No spam, ever. Your info is safe with us.
form.success: Message sent successfully! We'll get back to you shortly.
form.error: Oops! Failed to send. Please try again.

arab-student-mentorship-2021.title: Arab Student Mentorship Program
arab-student-mentorship-2021.description: A mentorship program for Arab university students working on blockchain-based research or graduation projects. Selected teams received up to 5 direct office hours with expert mentors — with an extra 2-hour bonus for women-led or mixed-gender teams. This program is now closed.

0xcairo-iii-security-day-2026.title: 0xCairo III: Security Day
0xcairo-iii-security-day-2026.description: A full-day security event with hands-on EVM and Solana auditing workshops, an Agentic AI Security track, and Cairo's first live Web3 CTF (Capture The Flag) competition. Limited seats — workshops and CTF available separately.
0xcairo-iii-security-day-2026.location: The Egyptian Chinese University, Nasr City, Cairo, Egypt

global-pizza-party-cairo-2026.title: 2026 Global Pizza Party Cairo
global-pizza-party-cairo-2026.description: Celebrating Bitcoin Pizza Day with the global PizzaDAO movement — free pizza, crypto conversations, and a night honoring the 10,000 BTC transaction that started it all. Co-hosted with PizzaDAO, World Pizza Champions, and ENS.
global-pizza-party-cairo-2026.location: Sedra — 90th St. Branch, New Cairo, Egypt

dev3pack-hack-cairo-2026.title: Dev3pack Hack — Cairo Hub
dev3pack-hack-cairo-2026.description: Arabs in Blockchain hosted the Cairo hub for Dev3pack Hack — bringing together local builders to collaborate, build, and compete in this global Web3 hackathon.
dev3pack-hack-cairo-2026.location: Bosla Co-working Space, Dokki, Giza, Egypt

chainlink-convergence-mixer-2026.title: Build & Connect: Chainlink Convergence Mixer
chainlink-convergence-mixer-2026.description: An evening mixer bringing together Cairo's blockchain builders for networking and discussions around the Chainlink ecosystem and Web3 development.

web3-compliance-meetup-2026.title: Build & Connect: Web3 Compliance Meetup
web3-compliance-meetup-2026.description: A focused meetup exploring regulatory frameworks, compliance challenges, and the future of legal clarity in the Web3 space — with Cairo's blockchain community.

dune-cairo-meetup-2025.title: Build & Connect: Dune Cairo Meetup
dune-cairo-meetup-2025.description: A deep dive into on-chain data analytics with Dune. Learn to query, visualize, and interpret blockchain data with Cairo's growing data community.

arab-connect-devcon-2025.title: Arab Connect @ Devconnect
arab-connect-devcon-2025.description: Our flagship side event at Devconnect in Buenos Aires — bringing together Arab builders, founders, and researchers from across the globe for an evening of connection.

road-to-sub0-cairo-2025.title: Road to sub0 — Builder Party Cairo
road-to-sub0-cairo-2025.description: A builder-focused gathering in Cairo ahead of Polkadot's sub0 conference, celebrating the local Web3 developer community and the Polkadot ecosystem.

linkup-forte-hacks-cairo-2025.title: Link.Up Cairo: Forte-Hacks Mixer
linkup-forte-hacks-cairo-2025.description: A community mixer bringing together Cairo's builders and hackers in celebration of the Forte-Hacks hackathon — networking, project showcases, and conversations.

0xcairo-bytes-zkverify-2025.title: 0xCairo Bytes: Don't Trust, zkVerify
0xcairo-bytes-zkverify-2025.description: A technical session at AUC exploring zero-knowledge proofs and the zkVerify protocol — with live demos, deep dives, and Q&A with ZK researchers.

linkup-chainlink-cairo-2025.title: Link.Up Cairo: Chromion Mixer
linkup-chainlink-cairo-2025.description: A Chainlink ecosystem mixer in Cairo, celebrating the Chromion milestone and bringing together 100+ builders from Egypt's Web3 scene.

0xcairo-tech-day-1-2024.title: 0xCairo I
0xcairo-tech-day-1-2024.description: A full-day Web3 educational event at The Egyptian Chinese University — featuring Blockchain 101, a hands-on CCIP cross-chain workshop, real-world ZK applications, and a panel on Web3's future in Egypt.
0xcairo-tech-day-1-2024.location: The Egyptian Chinese University (ECU), Ain Shams, Cairo, Egypt

devcon-7-meetup-2024.title: الفيل في المنديل 🐘 — Arabs in Blockchain @ Devcon 7
devcon-7-meetup-2024.description: Our landmark gathering at Devcon 7 in Bangkok — over 137 Arab and Arab-allied builders came together for an unforgettable evening in Southeast Asia.

0xcairo-tech-day-2-2024.title: 0xCairo Tech Day II
0xcairo-tech-day-2-2024.description: Our second Tech Day in Cairo — a full-day event with technical talks, workshops, and demos attended by 776 builders. One of our biggest events ever.

0xcairo-meetup-2024.title: 0xCairo Meetup
0xcairo-meetup-2024.description: A relaxed community meetup for Cairo's blockchain builders — an evening of networking, knowledge sharing, and connecting with like-minded Web3 enthusiasts.

ethcc-brussels-2024.title: بلجيكا شيكا بيكا 🇧🇪 — Arabs in Blockchain @ ETHcc 7
ethcc-brussels-2024.description: Our side event at ETHcc 7 in Brussels — 78 Arab community members attending the conference gathered for an evening of connection and celebration.

cv-workshop-2024.title: Workshop: Writing an Effective Developer CV
cv-workshop-2024.description: An online workshop in Arabic helping Web3 developers craft compelling CVs and navigate the blockchain job market — practical, hands-on, and free.

bitcoin-pizza-day-cairo-2024.title: Global Pizza Party 2024 — Cairo
bitcoin-pizza-day-cairo-2024.description: Cairo's celebration of Bitcoin Pizza Day — a community gathering honoring the legendary first real-world Bitcoin transaction with pizza, talks, and networking.

ai-blockchain-brunch-cairo-2024.title: AI & Blockchain Community Brunch
ai-blockchain-brunch-cairo-2024.description: A morning brunch at The GrEEK Campus exploring the intersection of AI and blockchain — 247 attendees joined for talks, demos, and collaborative discussions.

bitcoin-pizza-day-cairo-2023.title: Cairo Bitcoin Pizza Day 2023
bitcoin-pizza-day-cairo-2023.description: Cairo's celebration of Bitcoin Pizza Day 2023 — a community gathering marking the anniversary of the first real-world Bitcoin commercial transaction.

community-call-2023.title: Monthly Community Call
community-call-2023.description: Our regular monthly community call for Arab blockchain enthusiasts — updates, open discussions, and a chance to connect with members from across the Arab world.

web3-wellness-day-2022.title: Web3 Wellness Day
web3-wellness-day-2022.description: A unique event at AUC New Cairo blending wellness and Web3 — a day of mindful workshops, blockchain talks, and community building.

arab-blockchain-week-2022.title: Arab Blockchain Week 2022
arab-blockchain-week-2022.description: The second edition of Arab Blockchain Week — a week-long virtual conference bringing together Arab blockchain builders, researchers, and community members from across the region.

arab-blockchain-week-2021.title: Arab Blockchain Week 2021 — First Edition
arab-blockchain-week-2021.description: The first edition of Arab Blockchain Week, June 12–17, 2021 — a week-long virtual conference co-hosted by the community, bringing together Arab speakers and blockchain leaders from across the region.

webinar-series-2020.title: Community Webinar Series 2020
webinar-series-2020.description: Our founding year of online webinars — the educational sessions that launched the Arab blockchain community. Watch the full series on YouTube.

eman-herawy.name: Eman Herawy
eman-herawy.bio: Founder of Arabs in Blockchain. Smart contract developer and open-source advocate building the bridge between the Arab world and global blockchain ecosystems since 2020.
eman-herawy.title: Senior Blockchain Developer | Smart Contract Security Auditor | Founder @ Arabs in Blockchain | Chainlink Developer Expert

bahaa-taha.name: Bahaa Ehab Taha
bahaa-taha.title: Full-Stack Blockchain Developer & Founder of Tecno Blocks
bahaa-taha.bio: Blockchain Developer with 9 years of experience. Passionate about building sites and apps, with a focus on integrating Web2 and Web3 technologies. Founder of Tecno Blocks and ardapps.

omar-osman.name: Omar Osman
omar-osman.title: Backend Engineer
omar-osman.bio: Computer Engineering graduate from the American University in Cairo. Passionate about full-stack blockchain development and system design. Ex-Nethermind DevOps intern. Currently building a ticketing and membership Web3 system.

nour-elden-nader.name: Nour Elden Nader
nour-elden-nader.title: Blockchain Engineer · Building in RWA Tokenization | ex Amb @CyfrinUpdraft

tasneem-toolba.name: Tasneem Toolba
tasneem-toolba.title: Full-Stack Web3 Developer
tasneem-toolba.bio: Full-Stack Web3 Developer and multiple hackathon winner.

ahmed-elsharabassi.name: Ahmed Elsharabassi
ahmed-elsharabassi.title: Events Manager at 1inch Network
ahmed-elsharabassi.bio: Web3 events expert with a background in Engineering and Management. MSc from TU Berlin. Managing global events at 1inch Network, the leading DeFi Aggregation Protocol.

janna-elsheshtawy.name: Janna Elsheshtawy
janna-elsheshtawy.title: Software Developer | Teaching Assistant | MSc Student in AI

khawla-hassan.name: Khawla Hassan
khawla-hassan.title: Research Assistant & Blockchain Researcher
khawla-hassan.bio: Research Assistant with nearly 3 years of experience, two of which focused on blockchain. Mathematics undergraduate who combines a passion for coding with research, bridging theoretical and practical perspectives. Graduate of the Frankfurt School Blockchain Center's DLT Talents program, which deepened her understanding of distributed ledger technology.

mohamed-darwish.name: Mohamed Darwish
mohamed-darwish.title: Co-Founder & CTO at Sabika · Blockchain & FinTech Builder
mohamed-darwish.bio: Blockchain and FinTech builder focused on digital gold and crypto infrastructure. Co-Founder & CTO at Sabika, Founder & CTO at Bydotpy, and a trading educator passionate about making financial markets accessible to the Arab world.

hussein-hashish.name: Hussein Hashish
hussein-hashish.title: Founder & CEO at likwid
hussein-hashish.bio: Spent thirteen years in supply chain and shipping before falling down the blockchain rabbit hole in 2018. MSc in Blockchain & Digital Currencies from University of Nicosia. Founded Blockchain Hub Egypt, launched Metaversive (a Web3 advisory), and now building likwid — a blockchain-powered loyalty app.

mohammed-mahmoud.name: Mohammed Mahmoud
mohammed-mahmoud.title: Researcher at ZkLC
mohammed-mahmoud.bio: Engineer building real-world applications in crypto — including a trade finance escrow service and verifiable accounting software. Active contributor in the Mina, Starknet, Aztec, Ethereum, and Bitcoin ecosystems.

mohamed-taysir.name: Mohamed Taysir
mohamed-taysir.title: CEO at Singularity Finance
mohamed-taysir.bio: CEO of Singularity Finance, a Blockchain Fintech startup in the UAE. Active in the blockchain space since 2017, global speaker at high-level events across Egypt, Japan, UAE, USA, UK, and Africa. Certified blockchain solutions architect and instructor.

yehia-tarek.name: Yehia Tarek
yehia-tarek.title: Blockchain Engineer at Nethermind
yehia-tarek.bio: Blockchain Engineer at Nethermind, contributing to DeFi and tokenization platforms. Builds solutions in blockchain technology to improve and innovate in the financial sector.

aya-ramadan.name: Aya Ramadan Ali
aya-ramadan.title: Technical Recruiter (ex-Nethermind)
aya-ramadan.bio: Technical Recruiter, formerly at Nethermind where she helped expand their reach to over 50 countries. Connects top Web3 talent with opportunities across the globe.

ahmed-akram.name: Ahmed Akram
ahmed-akram.title: Tech Lead & Co-founder at FuzeX
ahmed-akram.bio: Seasoned software engineer and co-founder of FuzeX, serving as tech lead. Works across blockchain, full-stack development, and deep learning.

milica-vulic.name: Milica Vulic
milica-vulic.title: Developer Relations Engineer & PhD candidate in ZK
milica-vulic.bio: Developer Relations Engineer at zkVerify and Horizen, and a PhD candidate specialising in Zero Knowledge Proofs. With over 8 years of experience as a developer and working in Web3 since 2018, she crafts developer-first content, tutorials, and workshops that make ZK approachable and practical for builders.

al-qaqaa.name: Al-Qa'qa'
al-qaqaa.title: Web3 Security Researcher
al-qaqaa.bio: EVM smart contract auditor and Web3 security researcher who secures smart contracts to avoid loss of funds.

frank-castle.name: Frank Castle
frank-castle.title: Rust/Solana Security Auditor
frank-castle.bio: Professional smart contract security researcher with focused expertise in auditing Rust-based programs and decentralized infrastructure across leading blockchain ecosystems, with 2 years of experience in Solana programs auditing.

mohamed-abumuslim.name: Mohamed AbuMuslim
mohamed-abumuslim.title: Security Expert
mohamed-abumuslim.bio: Mohamed AbuMuslim is a security researcher and offensive security engineer specializing in red teaming, penetration testing, adversarial AI, and product security. His work focuses on identifying exploitable weaknesses across web applications, APIs, cloud platforms, enterprise infrastructure, Active Directory, and AI-enabled systems. Over the years, he has worked across offensive security roles in organizations including Microsoft, PwC, and EY, contributing to security capability building and leading offensive security engagements in complex environments. Mohamed is a frequent speaker at Black Hat, DEF CON, BSides, and OWASP Cairo. He also supports the security community through speaking, education, and initiatives including AI Village, BSides Albuquerque, OWASP Cairo, and CyberDose.

rami-khalil.name: Rami Khalil
rami-khalil.title: Blockchain Protocol Engineer at Boundless
rami-khalil.bio: Formally studied Blockchain protocols at Imperial College London for his PhD, and at ETH Zurich for his MSc. Has been developing ZK protocols at RISC Zero/Boundless for the past three years.

mohamed-fouda.name: Dr. Mohamed Fouda
mohamed-fouda.title: Tech Builder & Investor — Building financial products for Muslims worldwide
mohamed-fouda.bio: Researcher and engineer with extensive experience in blockchain, cryptocurrency consensus mechanisms, and economics. PhD graduate from Northwestern University. Author of numerous technical and economic articles on blockchain.

hassan-imam.name: Hassan Imam
hassan-imam.title: Blockchain Social Impact Researcher
hassan-imam.bio: M.Sc. in International Relations from Aydin University, with a thesis on "Blockchain Technology and the Future of US Power in International Relations". Researcher in blockchain social impact with articles and educational videos published on the الفلاشاية platform on Facebook and YouTube.

marilyne-ordekian.name: Marilyne Ordekian
marilyne-ordekian.title: Junior Lawyer & Postgraduate Researcher
marilyne-ordekian.bio: Junior lawyer at the Beirut Bar Association with a taught Master's in Law and a Research Master's in Criminal Law. Her research papers are among the first academic works in the Arab region to discuss the regulation of cryptocurrencies in legal and criminal fields. Granted full funding from UCL and EPSRC to pursue a Ph.D. researching cybersecurity and regulatory aspects of cryptocurrency exchanges.

zakaria-hasaneen.name: Zakaria Hasaneen
zakaria-hasaneen.title: Certified Blockchain Expert & Teaching Assistant
zakaria-hasaneen.bio: Certified Blockchain Expert from Blockchain Council and Blockchain Technology Researcher with over 5 years of experience in accounting. University instructor and professional trainer dedicated to improving students' skills and advancing knowledge in the blockchain space.

andy-tudhope.name: Andy Tudhope
andy-tudhope.title: Janitor
andy-tudhope.bio: Finding the one thread beneath all the different stories we tell about value, and learning every day about what trust really means.

yasmin-razack.name: Dr. Yasmin Razack
yasmin-razack.title: Cybersecurity & Blockchain Specialist
yasmin-razack.bio: 25+ years of experience in IT, airline, and fintech industries. Headed change management divisions in a leading fintech company in the Middle East and a global airline in Dubai. Holds professional certifications including ITIL, PMP, Lean Six Sigma Black Belt, ISO 20000, CISA, and SaFE Agilist. Member of IEEE and PMI.

francis-mendoza.name: Francis Mendoza
francis-mendoza.title: Software Engineer at Intel
francis-mendoza.bio: MS Student at Arizona State University specializing in Distributed Ledger Technology for IoT and Autonomous Systems Cybersecurity.

bianca-trovo.name: Bianca Trovò
bianca-trovo.title: PhD Researcher & Co-founder of Ants-Review
bianca-trovo.bio: Doctoral candidate at CEA Saclay (France) and Sorbonne University researching spontaneous brain activity using EEG/MEG. Co-founded Ants-Review, a protocol for incentivizing scientific peer-reviews on Ethereum — winner of the first prize at ETH Turin 2020 hackathon. KERNEL Genesis Block Fellow (Gitcoin). Published researcher in blockchain applications for open science.

soha-safwat.name: Dr. Soha Safwat
soha-safwat.title: Dean, Faculty of Computers and Information Systems — Egyptian Chinese University

wes-saunders.name: Weslye Saunders
wes-saunders.title: NFL Veteran & Spiritual Life Advisor
wes-saunders.bio: National Football League veteran, formerly of the Pittsburgh Steelers and Indianapolis Colts. Holistic trainer, certified instructor with the International Institute of Sport & Movement, and emotional intelligence coach. Explores social solutions through Web3.

laman-mohamed.name: Laman Mohamed
laman-mohamed.title: Head of Metaverse & AI at Egyptian Geographic | PhD Researcher
laman-mohamed.bio: Head of the Metaverse and Artificial Intelligence Sector at the Egyptian Foundation for the Simplification of Science (Egyptian Geographic). PhD researcher in virtual and augmented reality.

christine-lewis.name: Christine Lewis
christine-lewis.title: The Yoga Boss — Founder of Yog8 DAO
christine-lewis.bio: Known as The Yoga Boss after teaching Transformational Yoga Therapy since 2009 to founders of multi-billion-dollar companies and professional athletes. Launched a Yoga DAO to democratize access to yoga and meditation through Web3 incentives. Creator of Yoga Boss NFTs and the Yog8 DAO wellness metaverse.

eiman-abdelmoneim.name: Eiman Abdelmoneim
eiman-abdelmoneim.title: Staff Engineer, Applied AI @ Nebula | ex-thirdweb
eiman-abdelmoneim.bio: Staff Engineer in Applied AI at Nebula, owning the AI-native middle of the funnel across forward-deployed engineering, product, and customer success. Previously at thirdweb.

mohammad-tayel.name: Mohammad Tayel
mohammad-tayel.title: LLM, MLRO @ Western Union | Co-Founder @ Qistaschain

youssef-kamal.name: Youssef Kamal
youssef-kamal.title: CEO at Euclid Solutions | Founder of People of Data
youssef-kamal.bio: Holds three master's degrees. Established data science and AI teams for various startups and founded a data science & AI consultancy. AI tutor at Udacity and founder of the People of Data community.

tarry-singh.name: Tarry Singh
tarry-singh.title: Board Director & AI Researcher at Real AI Inc. & DK AI Lab
tarry-singh.bio: Over 25 years in Data. Chairman & CEO of DK AI Holding, co-founder of Real AI (enterprise AI) and Earthscan.io (energy AI). All companies are part of the NVIDIA Inception Program.

shaheen-ahmed.name: Shaheen Ahmed
shaheen-ahmed.title: Developer Advocate at Cartesi
shaheen-ahmed.bio: Developer Advocacy Contributor at Cartesi — manages Discord, judges hackathons, prototypes ideas, and builds developer relationships. Background in Computer Science from VIT-Vellore; focused on decentralized protocols and full-stack Ethereum applications.

elif-hilal.name: Elif Hilal Umucu
elif-hilal.title: DevRel (ex-Chainlink Labs)
elif-hilal.bio: Elif developed a personal alphabet at age 10, igniting her passion for cryptography. By 17, she founded a global organization for blockchain enthusiasts and worked on blockchain projects at the Turkish Presidency Digital Transformation Office while in university. Her work spans smart contracts, digital identities, and blockchain innovation.

mohamed-elsharabassi.name: Mohamed Elsharabassi
mohamed-elsharabassi.title: Data Scientist / X-Analyst at ILLA Holdings | Musician | People of Data | Arabs in Blockchain | Ex-Intern at Nethermind
mohamed-elsharabassi.bio: Data scientist and analyst at ILLA Holdings with a passion for music and community building. Active member of Arabs in Blockchain and People of Data communities, with previous experience as an intern at Nethermind.

hatem-mabrouk.name: Hatem Mabrouk
hatem-mabrouk.title: Professor of International Business & Blockchain — Tecnológico de Monterrey
hatem-mabrouk.bio: Professor specializing in international business and blockchain technology at Tecnológico de Monterrey. Bridges academic research and real-world blockchain applications, with a focus on the economic and business implications of distributed ledger technology.

mohamed-behairy.name: Mohamed Behairy
mohamed-behairy.title: Product Manager at Capital One
mohamed-behairy.bio: Product Manager at Capital One with expertise in fintech and digital financial products. Passionate about leveraging emerging technologies including blockchain to drive innovation in the financial services sector.

kholoud-al-yami.name: Kholoud Al-Yami
kholoud-al-yami.title: Concept Senior Manager — Innovation Hub
kholoud-al-yami.bio: Concept Senior Manager at a leading innovation hub, focused on fostering entrepreneurship and emerging technology adoption. Drives strategic initiatives that bridge innovation ecosystems with blockchain and Web3 opportunities.

insaf-nori.name: Insaf Nori
insaf-nori.title: Blockchain Practitioner
insaf-nori.bio: Blockchain practitioner with a focus on education and community building in the Arab world. Advocates for accessible blockchain knowledge and supports initiatives that empower Arab-speaking communities to participate in the decentralized economy.

randa-al-rifai.name: Randa Al-Rifai
randa-al-rifai.title: Founder — Bitcoin Blockchain Beirut Labs & Lebanese Association for Digital Transformation
randa-al-rifai.bio: Founder of Bitcoin Blockchain Beirut Labs and the Lebanese Association for Digital Transformation. A pioneer in the Lebanese and Arab blockchain ecosystem, she has been building community infrastructure and driving digital literacy since Bitcoin's early days in the region.

ramy-aldamati.name: Ramy AlDamati
ramy-aldamati.title: Co-Founder & CSO at AlBrza
ramy-aldamati.bio: Co-Founder and Chief Strategy Officer at AlBrza. Focused on building blockchain-powered solutions and strategic frameworks that serve the Arab market, combining deep industry knowledge with a mission to accelerate Web3 adoption across the region.

fadi-amroush.name: Dr. Fadi Amroush
fadi-amroush.title: CTO at Niuversity
fadi-amroush.bio: Chief Technology Officer at Niuversity, leading technology strategy at the intersection of education and blockchain. Brings extensive technical expertise to building decentralized educational platforms that empower learners across the Arab world and beyond.

rabeb-ben-othmen.name: Rabeb Ben Othmen
rabeb-ben-othmen.title: Blockchain Researcher
rabeb-ben-othmen.bio: Blockchain researcher dedicated to advancing academic and applied understanding of distributed ledger technology. Her work explores the technical and societal dimensions of blockchain, contributing to the growing body of Arabic-language blockchain research.

melih-birim.name: Melih Birim
melih-birim.title: CTO & Co-Founder at TUBU ARGE
melih-birim.bio: Chief Technology Officer and Co-Founder of TUBU ARGE. Leads R&D efforts at the frontier of blockchain technology, building scalable infrastructure solutions and contributing to the global blockchain research community.

doaa-karem.name: Doaa Karem
doaa-karem.title: AI Security Researcher & ArabGuard Co-creator
doaa-karem.bio: AI Security Engineer and Researcher specializing in Large Language Model (LLM) vulnerabilities and prompt injection defenses. Co-creator of "ArabGuard," a pioneering dialect-aware defense framework for Arabic LLMs, with research published in IEEE ITC-Egypt. Lead designer of the GenAI Security CTF challenges at 0xCairo III.

ahmad-alaa.name: Ahmad Alaa
ahmad-alaa.title: Cybersecurity Enthusiast | Penetration Tester
ahmad-alaa.bio: Computer Science and Artificial Intelligence graduate interested in cybersecurity, ethical hacking, Linux, and AI security.

rahma-mohamed.name: Rahma Mohamed
rahma-mohamed.title: Mobile App Developer
rahma-mohamed.bio: Computer Science student passionate about cross-platform mobile application development with Flutter. Creating user-friendly, high-quality applications and always eager to learn new technologies.

adham-elhawary.name: Adham Elhawary
adham-elhawary.title: AI & Deep Learning Engineer
adham-elhawary.bio: AI and Deep Learning Engineer specializing in Natural Language Processing (NLP).
